data.name: Response_Response_Instagram_detected_suspicious_activity__you_need_to_verify_your_identity_
data.value: Response Response Instagram detected suspicious activity you need to verify your identity

data.name: Response_Response_Not_authorized_to_perform_action__skipping___
data.value: Response Response Not authorized to perform action skipping

data.name: Response_Response_Username_Doesn_t_Exist1
data.value: Response Response Username Doesn t Exist

data.name: Response_Response_You_are_not_logged_in__please_log_in_again_
data.value: Response Response You are not logged in please log in again

data.name: Response_Response_Can_t_like_this_picture_
data.value: Response Response Cant like this picture

data.name: Response_Response_Instagram_checkpoint__account_needs_mobile_verification_
data.value: Response Response Instagram checkpoint account needs mobile verification

data.name: Response_Response_Two_Factor_login__Right_click_your_account_and_enter_auth_code_
data.value: Response Response Two Factor login Right click your account and enter auth code

data.name: Response_Response_Your_account_has_been_sentry_blocked__Your_IP_account_has_been_flagged__It_is_advised_to_stop_botting_
data.value: Response Response Your account has been sentry blocked Your IP account has been flagged It is advised to stop botting

data.name: Response_Response_Your_password_has_been_reset__Surf_to_Instagram_for_instructions_on_getting_your_account_back_
data.value: Response Response Your password has been reset Surf to Instagram for instructions on getting your account back

data.value: ScrapingFilters GetFilterDetails Enter a Instagram url https www instagram com explore locations

data.value: ScrapingFilters GetFilterDetails Enter a Instagram url https://www.instagram.com/p
